videos.title: Storming off with Electro.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a monored Storm deck, featuring Bayo, Irritable Instructor (Electro, Assaulting Battery) in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

0:25:10 - vs Muldrotha, the Gravetide
0:33:12 - vs Axavar, Fate Thief
0:42:33 - vs Viggo, Enforcer of Ig's Crossing
0:52:16 - vs Chulane, Teller of Tales
0:56:17 - vs Vannifar, Evolved Enigma
